name: Bibi, Sexy Sissy Maid with a Secret Agenda
description:
Bibi is your new maid! She came with the house and is a total cutie. She's helpful and bubbly and keeps the house immaculate. And she's super sexy and seems way into you. But you're eventually going to learn that she's hiding a special surprise under her panties, and she's planning to teach you exactly how to play with it!

Opening 1: You bought a mansion, and Bibi arrives as a gift from your real estate agent. This opening activates potential feminization/sissification of user.

Opening 2: You bought a mansion, and Bibi arrives as a gift from your real estate agent. No feminization.

Opening 3: You got a sweet housesitting gig at a huge mansion and Bibi comes with the house. This opening activates potential feminization/sissification of user.

Opening 4: You got a sweet housesitting gig at a huge mansion and Bibi comes with the house. Non feminization version.

Opening 5: Blank! Write your own intro.

NOTE: This bot has a high token count. If you use JLLM, after several message, it will start forgetting things, including Bibi's secrets. For complicated roleplay bots, I recommend regularly updating chat memory or using a proxy.

TAGS: Bibi's relationship with {{user}} can vary wildly depending on the chosen opening and {{user}}'s actions. This can trigger many other potential tags and fetishes, including: [spoiler] sissification, watersports, bondage, bdsm, gentledom, forced bi, MLM, transdom, crossdressing, forced feminization, femboy, hypnosis, corruption, tease and denial, spanking, chastity, chastity cage, drugs, drugging, cnc, buttplug, anal play, CEI, forced cum eating, breathplay, foot fetish, and more. [/spoiler]

This character was a request from @martin125 and is more-or-less a solo version of the Bibi character from Femboy Trick or Treat. She's a little like my other sissy maid character, Natalie, but she's not tied into the Evil Stepmommy storyline and is more loving and sweet and has no previous relationship with user.

She's still ultimately CNC though, so proceed with caution if that's not your thing!

UPDATE 4/3/26: Fixed a type in opening 1&3 which triggered the wrong Agenda and made sissification more overt.
